scope: GSC-only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated here.
wins: Core local commercial terms hold top tiers: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' at pos 1.6 (#2-3, 7 impr), plus 'bariatric counseling san antonio' and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' both at 2.0 (#2-3).
'bariatric therapist' improved to 2.5 (delta +1.5 from 4.0) and 'bariatric counseling near me' to 8.0 (delta +4.5 from 12.5) - both national terms climbing into top-tier positions.
Strongest positive move: 'weight loss counseling' jumped from 70.3 to 41.8 (delta +28.5), though still 21+ with only 6 impressions.

Blog content drives the impression base at page-1 positions: 'better-sleep-for-weight-loss' 1,395 impr @ 14.2, 'how-to-improve-self-esteem' 757 impr @ 7.4 (8 clicks), 'weight-loss-medications' 748 impr @ 10.4.
Position distribution nudged up vs the 2026-07-01 run: #2-3 tier went from 3 to 4 keywords.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage (a KEYWORD count, not a page count): 26 of 75 tracked keywords show GSC data over the window (22 in the latest daily snapshot); 49 show none. Most tracked target pages are already live - only 2 of 48 distinct target pages point to staging - so gaps are tracker hygiene, not lost traffic.

Visibility drift across the timeline: first snapshot (2026-05-07) 2,447 impr @ avg pos 14.87 vs last (2026-07-02) 1,583 impr @ 31.26 - impressions down and average position worse. Directional only; the 2026-06-29 spike (3,724 impr, 24 clicks) was an anomaly and single-impression positions swing day to day.
Near-zero CTR: 1,583 impressions produced 4 clicks (~0.25%) on the latest day - impressions are not converting to visits.

Commercial terms with real impressions slipped: 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' -6.8 (17.6 to 24.4, 12 impr), 'bariatric counseling' -3.6 (12.3 to 15.9, 38 impr), 'bariatric surgery counseling' -4.0 (national). 'eating disorder therapist near me' -9.0 is on only 2 impressions and is noise.
Caveat: many tracked positions rest on 1-2 impressions and swing day to day; treat single-impression deltas as directional, not trend.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json ('what-is-a-bariatric-counselor' and 'what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor' on staging12) to their live www equivalents so GSC can match them.

Fix CTR: add clear CTAs and internal links from the highest-impression blog posts (better-sleep 1,395 impr, self-esteem 757 impr, weight-loss-medications 748 impr) into the matching service pages to route that impression volume into conversions.
On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms - 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' and 'bariatric counseling' - to arrest the decline.
Defend the core local #2-3 terms ('bariatric surgery counseling san antonio', 'bariatric counseling san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio') with fresh internal links and content updates.
Add/confirm FAQ schema on service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
If a staging-to-prod publish backlog is in question, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes rather than inferring a count from keyword data.
summary: GSC coverage holds at 26 of 75 tracked keywords with data; core San Antonio commercial terms stay in the #2-3 tier, but overall impressions and average position have drifted down over the window and CTR is near zero. Top priority is repointing the 2 stale staging tracker URLs and adding CTAs from high-impression blog posts into service pages.
